name: Techstars
description: Techstars accelerator application — product, traction, team, and ask.

fields.label: Company Name
fields.promptHint: The official company or project name.

fields.label: Elevator Pitch
fields.promptHint: Two to three sentences explaining what you do and why it matters.

fields.label: What problem are you solving?
fields.promptHint: The pain point, who feels it, and how severe it is. Use customer quotes if available.

fields.label: Describe your product or service
fields.promptHint: What you built, how it works, current stage (MVP, beta, GA).

fields.label: What traction do you have?
fields.promptHint: Users, revenue, growth rate, partnerships, LOIs. Numbers over narratives.

fields.label: Business Model
fields.promptHint: How you make money, pricing structure, current revenue if any.

fields.label: Who is on the team?
fields.promptHint: Founders, key hires, backgrounds, and why this team is uniquely suited.

fields.label: What do you need from Techstars?
fields.promptHint: Beyond funding — mentorship, intros, market access. Be specific about gaps.
